proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs on Webster Avenue are part of the Webster Avenue SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs extend the sidewalk out to the bus lane at SBS stations, creating additional space for bus riders and pedestrians

decisions.rationale: Block p001_c0008 in the Webster Avenue SBS newsletter describes bus bulbs as part of the Webster Avenue Corridor Design section, explicitly linking them to the SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs extend the sidewalk out to the bus lane at SBS stations, creating additional space for bus riders and pedestrians

proposed_relations.description: Offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue are part of the Webster Avenue SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Dedicated Bus (& Right Turn) Lanes:
Offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue between E 165 Street and E Gun Hill Road

Offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue between E 165 Street and E Gun Hill Road

proposed_relations.description: Right-turn bays on Webster Avenue are part of the Webster Avenue SBS project traffic operations improvements

evidence_refs.source_quote: Right-turn bays to reduce bus lane blockages at busy intersections

proposed_relations.description: Left-turn bans on Webster Avenue are part of the Webster Avenue SBS project traffic operations

evidence_refs.source_quote: Banning left turns at key intersections to reduce conflicts between vehicles and pedestrians and keep through traffic moving better.

proposed_relations.description: Delivery windows on Webster Avenue are part of the Webster Avenue SBS project curb regulations

evidence_refs.source_quote: Delivery Windows - Provide designated space for commercial vehicles during certain times of the day. These regulations keep the curb clear for store deliveries and help reduce double parking.

decisions.rationale: Block p002_c0018 lists delivery windows as a possible curb regulation improvement DOT is working on as part of the SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Delivery Windows - Provide designated space for commercial vehicles during certain times of the day. These regulations keep the curb clear for store deliveries and help reduce double parking.

proposed_relations.description: Metered parking on Webster Avenue is part of the Webster Avenue SBS project curb regulations

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metered Parking - Adding or extending metered parking areas encourages more parking turnover in retail areas, which is good for businesses who rely on curb side access for their customers.

decisions.rationale: Block p002_c0019 lists metered parking as a possible curb regulation improvement DOT is working on as part of the SBS project.
